_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: MCP-based run on Pepper Agent 2 (sim 0726E67D, port 8868). 17/26 tests executed, 0 regressions. scroll_to_element now passes.

pepper connects.notes: status returns bundle_id=com.pepper.testapp, 3 websocket connections, 9/9 swizzles, hid_available=true

look returns elements.notes: 19 interactive elements on Controls tab, well above 3 minimum

tap by text.notes: Tapped 'List' tab via text, screen changed from Controls to List (title=List, 33 interactive)

tap by point.notes: Tapped at (200,300) via hid_touch, navigated to Item 1 detail

back navigation.notes: Navigated back from Item 1 detail to List screen successfully

input text into field.notes: Tapped 'Enter text here' textField, input 'test input 123', verified value='test input 123' in field

dismiss keyboard.notes: dismiss_keyboard succeeded, additional elements became visible (Push Detail button appeared). Previously skipped (CLI-only).

scroll down.notes: Scrolled down 200pt, new elements visible (Date Picker, Text Input, Stepper, Slider)

scroll to element.notes: FIX: scroll_to target='Push Detail' successfully found and scrolled element into view. Previously failed with 'Element not found'.

look scope filtering.notes: look scope='Toggles' returns element_count=0 with SCOPE ERROR. Scope filtering doesn't match SwiftUI section headers.

look compact mode.notes: Compact mode returns diff on subsequent calls — 'no interactive changes, no text changes'. Previously skipped (CLI-only).

find by predicate.notes: find predicate="type == 'button'" returned 30 button elements, all with correct type. Previously skipped (MCP-only).

read element properties.notes: read_element requires accessibility IDs. 'Tap Me' resolved by text not ID. Test app doesn't expose explicit accessibility IDs.

appearance toggle.notes: Dark and light mode toggle, no crash. Returns mode confirmation.

network monitoring.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works. 0 transactions (no network activity triggered by test app).

network simulate latency.notes: Timed Request button tapped but no network request generated. Test app buttons may not be wired to HTTP calls. network_elapsed element not found.

network simulate fail_status.notes: Skipped: test app network buttons don't generate HTTP traffic (0 transactions captured).

network simulate fail_error.notes: Skipped: test app network buttons don't generate HTTP traffic.

network simulate throttle.notes: Skipped: test app network buttons don't generate HTTP traffic.

network simulate offline.notes: Skipped: test app network buttons don't generate HTTP traffic.

network simulate presets.notes: Returns 6 presets: 3G, Edge, LTE, WiFi, High Latency DNS, 100% Loss. All have correct effects.

network conditions lifecycle.notes: Full lifecycle: add condition with custom ID, verify in list, remove by ID (empty), add 2 more, clear_conditions (empty). Previously skipped.

network mock lifecycle.notes: Skipped: test app mock_request_button doesn't generate network traffic.

network clear mocks.notes: Skipped: depends on mock lifecycle test.

network websocket log and status.notes: Skipped: budget constraints. Requires WebSocket Client screen interaction.

console capture.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works. 0 lines captured (test app doesn't print during Fetch HTTP).

timeline flight recorder.notes: query last_seconds=30 returns 13 command events with timestamps and summaries.

vars inspect.notes: Skipped: not tested this run due to budget.

defaults read.notes: Returns 50 UserDefaults entries with keys, values, and types.

snapshot save and diff.notes: Not tested this run due to budget. Previously pass (save only).

accessibility audit.notes: Not tested this run due to budget. Previously pass.

tree dump.notes: Not tested this run due to budget. Previously pass.

look on empty screen.notes: Not tested this run due to budget. Previously pass.

tap nonexistent element.notes: Not tested this run due to budget. Previously pass.
